posts.author: fancysprinkles (Madison Reynolds)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I just set up a board for creative requests and put in an automation for subitems to notify everyday id the due date has passed within 7 days. I noticed that when the automation ran today, the notification went to the main item owner/assignee. When I add the condition for ‘person is someone’, I can only select the item owner and not the specific subitem owners.

However, when I do the an automation for subitems with ‘1 day before due date’ or ‘1 day after due date’, there is an option to select the subitem specific owner.

Is there a way around this to only send recurring notifications to the specific subitem owner? Or is this something not yet available. If not, I would like this as a feature request.

Any help is appreciated, thanks!

(Automations for reference)
